speaker: PROVOST
text: Come hither, sirrah. Can you cut off a man’s

speaker: PROVOST
text: head?

speaker: POMPEY
text: If the man be a bachelor, sir, I can; but if he be

speaker: POMPEY
text: a married man, he’s his wife’s head, and I can never

speaker: POMPEY
text: cut off a woman’s head.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Come, sir, leave me your snatches, and yield

speaker: PROVOST
text: me a direct answer. Tomorrow morning are to die

speaker: PROVOST
text: Claudio and Barnardine. Here is in our prison a

speaker: PROVOST
text: common executioner, who in his office lacks a

speaker: PROVOST
text: helper. If you will take it on you to assist him, it

speaker: PROVOST
text: shall redeem you from your gyves; if not, you shall

speaker: PROVOST
text: have your full time of imprisonment and your

speaker: PROVOST
text: deliverance with an unpitied whipping, for you have

speaker: PROVOST
text: been a notorious bawd.

speaker: POMPEY
text: Sir, I have been an unlawful bawd time out of

speaker: POMPEY
text: mind, but yet I will be content to be a lawful

speaker: POMPEY
text: hangman. I would be glad to receive some instruction

speaker: POMPEY
text: from my fellow partner.

speaker: PROVOST
text: What ho, Abhorson!—Where’s Abhorson

speaker: PROVOST
text: there?

speaker: ABHORSON
text: Do you call, sir?

speaker: PROVOST
text: Sirrah, here’s a fellow will help you tomorrow

speaker: PROVOST
text: in your execution. If you think it meet, compound

speaker: PROVOST
text: with him by the year and let him abide here

speaker: PROVOST
text: with you; if not, use him for the present and dismiss

speaker: PROVOST
text: him. He cannot plead his estimation with you; he

speaker: PROVOST
text: hath been a bawd.

speaker: ABHORSON
text: A bawd, sir? Fie upon him! He will discredit

speaker: ABHORSON
text: our mystery.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Go to, sir; you weigh equally. A feather will

speaker: PROVOST
text: turn the scale.

speaker: POMPEY
text: Pray, sir, by your good favor—for surely, sir, a

speaker: POMPEY
text: good favor you have, but that you have a hanging

speaker: POMPEY
text: look—do you call, sir, your occupation a mystery?

speaker: ABHORSON
text: Ay, sir, a mystery.

speaker: POMPEY
text: Painting, sir, I have heard say, is a mystery;

speaker: POMPEY
text: and your whores, sir, being members of my occupation,

speaker: POMPEY
text: using painting, do prove my occupation a

speaker: POMPEY
text: mystery; but what mystery there should be in hanging,

speaker: POMPEY
text: if I should be hanged, I cannot imagine.

speaker: ABHORSON
text: Sir, it is a mystery.

speaker: POMPEY
text: Proof?

speaker: ABHORSON
text: Every true man’s apparel fits your thief. If it

speaker: ABHORSON
text: be too little for your thief, your true man thinks it

speaker: ABHORSON
text: big enough; if it be too big for your thief, your thief

speaker: ABHORSON
text: thinks it little enough. So every true man’s apparel

speaker: ABHORSON
text: fits your thief.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Are you agreed?

speaker: POMPEY
text: Sir, I will serve him, for I do find your hangman

speaker: POMPEY
text: is a more penitent trade than your bawd. He

speaker: POMPEY
text: doth oftener ask forgiveness.

speaker: PROVOST
text: You, sirrah, provide your block

speaker: PROVOST
text: and your axe tomorrow, four o’clock.

speaker: ABHORSON
text: Come on, bawd. I will instruct

speaker: ABHORSON
text: thee in my trade. Follow.

speaker: POMPEY
text: I do desire to learn, sir; and I hope, if you have

speaker: POMPEY
text: occasion to use me for your own turn, you shall find

speaker: POMPEY
text: me yare. For truly, sir, for your kindness, I owe

speaker: POMPEY
text: you a good turn.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Call hither Barnardine and Claudio.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Th’ one has my pity; not a jot the other,

speaker: PROVOST
text: Being a murderer, though he were my brother.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Look, here’s the warrant, Claudio, for thy death.

speaker: PROVOST
text: ’Tis now dead midnight, and by eight tomorrow

speaker: PROVOST
text: Thou must be made immortal. Where’s Barnardine?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: As fast locked up in sleep as guiltless labor

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: When it lies starkly in the traveler’s bones.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: He will not wake.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Who can do good on him?

speaker: PROVOST
text:
Well, go, prepare yourself.
                 
                Knock
                 
                within
                .
               But hark, what noise?—

speaker: PROVOST
text: Heaven give your spirits comfort.

speaker: PROVOST
text: By and by!—

speaker: PROVOST
text: I hope it is some pardon or reprieve

speaker: PROVOST
text: For the most gentle Claudio.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Welcome, father.

speaker: DUKE
text: The best and wholesom’st spirits of the night

speaker: DUKE
text: Envelop you, good provost. Who called here of late?

speaker: PROVOST
text: None since the curfew rung.

speaker: DUKE
text: Not Isabel?

speaker: PROVOST
text: No.

speaker: DUKE
text: They will, then, ere ’t be long.

speaker: PROVOST
text: What comfort is for Claudio?

speaker: DUKE
text: There’s some in hope.

speaker: PROVOST
text: It is a bitter deputy.

speaker: DUKE
text: Not so, not so. His life is paralleled

speaker: DUKE
text: Even with the stroke and line of his great justice.

speaker: DUKE
text: He doth with holy abstinence subdue

speaker: DUKE
text: That in himself which he spurs on his power

speaker: DUKE
text: To qualify in others. Were he mealed with that

speaker: DUKE
text: Which he corrects, then were he tyrannous,

speaker: DUKE
text:
But this being so, he’s just.
                 
                Knock
                 
                within
                .
               Now are they come.

speaker: DUKE
text: This is a gentle provost. Seldom when

speaker: DUKE
text: The steelèd jailer is the friend of men.

speaker: DUKE
text: How now, what noise? That spirit’s possessed with haste

speaker: DUKE
text: That wounds th’ unsisting postern with these strokes.

speaker: PROVOST
text: There he must stay until the officer

speaker: PROVOST
text: Arise to let him in. He is called up.

speaker: DUKE
text: Have you no countermand for Claudio yet,

speaker: DUKE
text: But he must die tomorrow?

speaker: PROVOST
text: None, sir, none.

speaker: DUKE
text: As near the dawning, provost, as it is,

speaker: DUKE
text: You shall hear more ere morning.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Happily

speaker: PROVOST
text: You something know, yet I believe there comes

speaker: PROVOST
text: No countermand. No such example have we.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Besides, upon the very siege of justice

speaker: PROVOST
text: Lord Angelo hath to the public ear

speaker: PROVOST
text: Professed the contrary.

speaker: PROVOST
text: This is his Lordship’s man.

speaker: DUKE
text: And here comes Claudio’s pardon.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: My lord hath sent

speaker: MESSENGER
text: you this note, and by me this further charge: that

speaker: MESSENGER
text: you swerve not from the smallest article of it,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: neither in time, matter, or other circumstance.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Good morrow, for, as I take it, it is almost day.

speaker: PROVOST
text: I shall obey him.

speaker: DUKE
text: This is his pardon, purchased by such sin

speaker: DUKE
text: For which the pardoner himself is in.

speaker: DUKE
text: Hence hath offense his quick celerity

speaker: DUKE
text: When it is borne in high authority.

speaker: DUKE
text: When vice makes mercy, mercy’s so extended

speaker: DUKE
text: That for the fault’s love is th’ offender friended.

speaker: DUKE
text:
As
                 
                Friar
                .
                 
              Now, sir, what news?

speaker: PROVOST
text: I told you: Lord Angelo, belike thinking me

speaker: PROVOST
text: remiss in mine office, awakens me with this unwonted

speaker: PROVOST
text: putting-on, methinks strangely; for he hath

speaker: PROVOST
text: not used it before.

speaker: DUKE
text: Pray you let’s hear.

speaker: PROVOST
text:
,
               
              reads
               
              the
               
              letter
              .
            
            
              
              Whatsoever
               
              you
               
              may
               
              hear
               
              to
               
              the
               
              contrary
              ,
               
              let
               
              Claudio
              
              be
               
              executed
               
              by
               
              four
               
              of
               
              the
               
              clock
              ,
               
              and
               
              in
               
              the
               
              afternoon
              
              Barnardine
              .
               
              For
               
              my
               
              better
               
              satisfaction
              ,
               
              let
               
              me
               
              have
              
              Claudio’s
               
              head
               
              sent
               
              me
               
              by
               
              five
              .
               
              Let
               
              this
               
              be
               
              duly
              
              performed
               
              with
               
              a
               
              thought
               
              that
               
              more
               
              depends
               
              on
               
              it
              
              than
               
              we
               
              must
               
              yet
               
              deliver
              .
               
              Thus
               
              fail
               
              not
               
              to
               
              do
               
              your
              
              office
              ,
               
              as
               
              you
               
              will
               
              answer
               
              it
               
              at
               
              your
               
              peril
              .
              
              What
               
              say
               
              you
               
              to
               
              this
              ,
               
              sir
              ?

speaker: DUKE
text: What is that Barnardine who is to be

speaker: DUKE
text: executed in th’ afternoon?

speaker: PROVOST
text: A Bohemian born, but here nursed up and

speaker: PROVOST
text: bred; one that is a prisoner nine years old.

speaker: DUKE
text: How came it that the absent duke had

speaker: DUKE
text: not either delivered him to his liberty, or executed

speaker: DUKE
text: him? I have heard it was ever his manner to do so.

speaker: PROVOST
text: His friends still wrought reprieves for him;

speaker: PROVOST
text: and indeed his fact, till now in the government of

speaker: PROVOST
text: Lord Angelo, came not to an undoubtful proof.

speaker: DUKE
text: It is now apparent?

speaker: PROVOST
text: Most manifest, and not denied by himself.

speaker: DUKE
text: Hath he borne himself penitently in

speaker: DUKE
text: prison? How seems he to be touched?

speaker: PROVOST
text: A man that apprehends death no more dreadfully

speaker: PROVOST
text: but as a drunken sleep; careless, reckless, and

speaker: PROVOST
text: fearless of what’s past, present, or to come; insensible

speaker: PROVOST
text: of mortality and desperately mortal.

speaker: DUKE
text: He wants advice.

speaker: PROVOST
text: He will hear none. He hath evermore had the

speaker: PROVOST
text: liberty of the prison; give him leave to escape

speaker: PROVOST
text: hence, he would not. Drunk many times a day, if not

speaker: PROVOST
text: many days entirely drunk. We have very oft awaked

speaker: PROVOST
text: him, as if to carry him to execution, and showed

speaker: PROVOST
text: him a seeming warrant for it. It hath not moved him

speaker: PROVOST
text: at all.

speaker: DUKE
text: More of him anon. There is written in

speaker: DUKE
text: your brow, provost, honesty and constancy; if I read

speaker: DUKE
text: it not truly, my ancient skill beguiles me. But in the

speaker: DUKE
text: boldness of my cunning, I will lay myself in hazard.

speaker: DUKE
text: Claudio, whom here you have warrant to execute, is

speaker: DUKE
text: no greater forfeit to the law than Angelo, who hath

speaker: DUKE
text: sentenced him. To make you understand this in a

speaker: DUKE
text: manifested effect, I crave but four days’ respite, for

speaker: DUKE
text: the which you are to do me both a present and a

speaker: DUKE
text: dangerous courtesy.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Pray, sir, in what?

speaker: DUKE
text: In the delaying death.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Alack, how may I do it, having the hour

speaker: PROVOST
text: limited, and an express command, under penalty,

speaker: PROVOST
text: to deliver his head in the view of Angelo? I may

speaker: PROVOST
text: make my case as Claudio’s, to cross this in the

speaker: PROVOST
text: smallest.

speaker: DUKE
text: By the vow of mine order I warrant

speaker: DUKE
text: you, if my instructions may be your guide. Let this

speaker: DUKE
text: Barnardine be this morning executed and his head

speaker: DUKE
text: borne to Angelo.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Angelo hath seen them both and will discover

speaker: PROVOST
text: the favor.

speaker: DUKE
text: O, death’s a great disguiser, and you

speaker: DUKE
text: may add to it. Shave the head and tie the beard, and

speaker: DUKE
text: say it was the desire of the penitent to be so bared

speaker: DUKE
text: before his death. You know the course is common.

speaker: DUKE
text: If anything fall to you upon this, more than thanks

speaker: DUKE
text: and good fortune, by the saint whom I profess, I

speaker: DUKE
text: will plead against it with my life.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Pardon me, good father, it is against my oath.

speaker: DUKE
text: Were you sworn to the Duke or to the

speaker: DUKE
text: Deputy?

speaker: PROVOST
text: To him and to his substitutes.

speaker: DUKE
text: You will think you have made no

speaker: DUKE
text: offense if the Duke avouch the justice of your

speaker: DUKE
text: dealing?

speaker: PROVOST
text: But what likelihood is in that?

speaker: DUKE
text: Not a resemblance, but a certainty; yet

speaker: DUKE
text: since I see you fearful, that neither my coat, integrity,

speaker: DUKE
text: nor persuasion can with ease attempt you, I will

speaker: DUKE
text: go further than I meant, to pluck all fears out of

speaker: DUKE
text: you. Look you, sir, here is the hand and seal of the

speaker: DUKE
text:
Duke.
                 
                He
                 
                shows
                 
                the
                 
                Provost
                 
                a
                 
                paper
                .
               You know the

speaker: DUKE
text: character, I doubt not, and the signet is not strange

speaker: DUKE
text: to you.

speaker: PROVOST
text: I know them both.

speaker: DUKE
text: The contents of this is the return of the

speaker: DUKE
text: Duke; you shall anon overread it at your pleasure,

speaker: DUKE
text: where you shall find within these two days he will

speaker: DUKE
text: be here. This is a thing that Angelo knows not, for

speaker: DUKE
text: he this very day receives letters of strange tenor,

speaker: DUKE
text: perchance of the Duke’s death, perchance entering

speaker: DUKE
text: into some monastery, but by chance nothing of

speaker: DUKE
text: what is writ. Look, th’ unfolding star calls up the

speaker: DUKE
text: shepherd. Put not yourself into amazement how

speaker: DUKE
text: these things should be. All difficulties are but easy

speaker: DUKE
text: when they are known. Call your executioner, and

speaker: DUKE
text: off with Barnardine’s head. I will give him a present

speaker: DUKE
text: shrift, and advise him for a better place. Yet you are

speaker: DUKE
text: amazed, but this shall absolutely resolve you.

speaker: DUKE
text: Come away; it is almost clear dawn.
